== Notes for [[Item:Q111301|Q111301]] ==

http://freepages.genealogy.rootsweb.com/~guenther77/pafg194.htm#4041
=Anicia Demetrias of Rome=
*[Parents] Consul Amnius Anicius JULIANUS of Rome [Parents] died about 330.
They (Anicia) had the following children:
# M i Consul Petronius PROBINUS of Rome
# F ii Faltonia Betitia PROBA of Rome

SOURCE NOTES:
http://www.american-pictures.com/genealogy/persons/per04532.htm#0

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
